name: Cliff Drysdale Tennis Garden at Mauna Lani
description: Cliff Drysdale Tennis Garden at Mauna Lani is a place to play pickleball in Waimea, HI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, water, and youth programming.

name: Courtyard Marriott King Kamehameha Kona Beach Hotel
description: Come play pickleball at Courtyard Marriott King Kamehameha Kona Beach Hotel in Kalaoa, HI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hawaii Tennis Center at the Fairmont Orchid Hotel
description: Come play pickleball at Hawaii Tennis Center at the Fairmont Orchid Hotel in Waimea, HI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
